description: Intent-only request: recognize generic inbox handling as under-specified on scope, autonomy, and interaction mode.
processExpectations: The agent explains that whether this is rule-based filing, judgment-based triage, or autonomous reply-sending determines the anchor, and the request does not specify which.
The agent identifies missing information about the scope of inbox handling, the level of autonomy expected, and the interaction mode (e.g. filing vs. replying), without asking the user a question.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
